overall.description: A truck simulation game showing first-person cabin view of driving on a snow-covered highway at night during heavy snowfall. The windshield wipers are active throughout as the vehicle navigates past other cars and under overhead road signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered highway with active windshield wipers

events.description: overtaking a white SUV on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through heavy snowfall with headlights illuminating the road ahead and wipers clearing the windshield

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving ahead in the same lane, later overtaken on the right

entered.detail: blue rectangular road sign with white 'P' parking symbol visible through snowfall
tall snow bank lining the left side of the highway
tall snow bank lining the right side of the highway
metal highway guardrail partially covered in snow
white sport utility vehicle driving ahead on the snowy highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person truck cabin view driving on a snow-covered highway at night. Heavy snow falls continuously as the windshield wipers sweep back and forth. A blue parking sign is visible ahead, and the truck approaches and overtakes a white SUV on the right. Snow banks line both sides of the road with metal guardrails visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway stretch with snow banks and intermittent traffic

events.description: approaching a vehicle with red taillights visible ahead in the distance
overtaking the vehicle with red taillights on the right side

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while navigating through heavy snow conditions, passing slower vehicles

notable_agents.action: vehicle with glowing red taillights driving ahead, subsequently overtaken

entered.detail: blue highway directional sign visible through the snowfall
red taillights of a vehicle ahead visible in the snow

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the snowy highway, the truck passes the white SUV and approaches a blue directional sign. A vehicle with red taillights appears ahead in the distance, which the truck gradually catches up to and overtakes on the right. Snow banks and guardrails remain constant on both sides as the heavy snowfall persists.

events.description: approaching large overhead gantry structure spanning the highway
passing directly underneath the overhead gantry which temporarily blocks the sky view

agents.ego_description: driving steadily toward and passing under the overhead highway sign structure

entered.detail: large metal overhead gantry with blue directional signs spanning the highway width
road sign post visible on the left side of the highway
second overhead gantry structure visible in the distance toward the end of the segment

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches a large overhead gantry with blue highway signs spanning the road. After passing underneath the structure, the highway continues through the snowy landscape. Toward the end of the segment, a second overhead gantry becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway passing second overhead sign structure

events.description: passing underneath the second overhead gantry structure

agents.ego_description: continuing highway driving through persistent heavy snowfall, maintaining steady course

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the truck passing under the second overhead gantry and continuing along the snow-covered highway. The heavy snowfall persists with windshield wipers maintaining visibility. The road stretches ahead into the darkness, flanked by snow banks, as the journey continues through the winter storm.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin navigating a dark, snow-covered highway through a relentless winter storm. It begins with the windshield wipers sweeping away heavy snowfall as the truck approaches a blue parking sign and overtakes a white SUV on the right. As the vehicle continues forward, the camera tracks past another car with glowing red taillights, maintaining a steady path between deep snow banks and metal guardrails. The scene then shifts as the truck passes under a large overhead gantry with blue directional signs, before the road opens up to reveal a second gantry appearing in the distance. Finally, the camera glides under the second structure and continues deep into the darkness of the storm, with the highway stretching forward into the snowy night.
